title: [CFG] TOML config for approved sandbox directories
description: When sandbox restrictions land (tk-oh88), users need an easy way to approve directories. Add TOML config support for specifying allowed read/write paths. Should integrate with the config hierarchy (ai/design/config-system.md).

logs.msg: tk-oh88 closed as won't-do. This task's premise was configuring extra writable dirs for the OS sandbox. With no OS sandbox, the scope changes: would only apply to app-level check_sandbox() for file tools. Low value on its own — defer indefinitely.
